prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with carbohydrate loading and meal timing around a 2-hour morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers exactly one full day with 4-5 meals strategically timed around the 2-hour morning training session
Total daily calorie intake is appropriate for a marathon runner (approximately 3000-3500 calories)
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total calories with emphasis on pre- and post-run meals
Plan is compact and presented in a concise format suitable for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high calorie intake and carbohydrate loading, including specific timing of meals around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle building and strength gains with optimal recovery for weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with clear meal timing
Includes high protein intake (minimum 1.6g per kg bodyweight) distributed across meals
Contains pre-workout and post-workout nutrition strategically timed around training
Compact format with practical, realistic food choices suitable for a single athlete
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring high protein intake and muscle recovery focus, with emphasis on nutrient timing around workouts

prompt_inputs.goal: Make weight for boxing match (target 71 kg) while maintaining strength and performance for training
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No dairy, no processed foods, limited to: chicken breast, brown rice, sweet potatoes, broccoli, eggs, oats, olive oil, salt, water

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 1,800-2,000 calories to achieve safe weight loss while preserving muscle
Includes at least 150g protein distributed across meals to maintain athletic performance
Specifies hydration strategy accounting for weight-cutting needs without compromising training capacity
All meals use only the listed restricted food options
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific constraint athlete (boxer making weight) requiring calorie control and hydration balance while maintaining performance, with limited food options
